expectations.text: The response mentions .claude/agents/ as the directory for defining custom agents
expectations.evidence: '.claude/agents/code-reviewer.md' shown with table of project vs user scope locations.

expectations.text: The response mentions claude --agent=<name> as the way to invoke a custom agent
expectations.evidence: 'claude --agent code-reviewer' documented under 'Run Entire Session as the Agent'.

expectations.text: The response explains the agent file format (markdown with frontmatter or specific structure)
expectations.evidence: Complete frontmatter reference table with 14 fields (name, description, tools, model, permissionMode, maxTurns, skills, mcpServers, hooks, memory, background, effort, disallowedTools). Full example with YAML frontmatter + markdown body.
